response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust expertise in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background is adjacent but not equivalent to the required systems-level C++ work, and there’s minimal evidence of routing tile optimization, real-time traffic integration, or fault-tolerant geospatial data systems.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO use
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse languages (DLang, C++, Node.js)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tile pipelines
Lacks demonstrated work on distributed systems for global-scale geospatial data
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ systems focus
